description: Get ready to ring in the New Year with a vibrant and engaging email template that expertly blends abstract and geometric design elements. This colourful and fun template is perfect for Software and Technology businesses looking to highlight their year's achievements and promotions in a visually appealing way. It's designed to showcase your year in review, making it easy for your audience to see your milestones and successes. Additionally, its social platform-friendly design helps promote your brand's online presence. With its unique blend of design and functionality, this email template is a great tool to boost your seasonal promotion efforts for the New Year.
short_description: Ring in the New Year with a vibrant email template that blends abstract and geometric design for Software and Technology businesses. Showcase your year in review and boost seasonal promotion efforts with our colourful, social platform-friendly design.

designer.description: Hi, I'm Betina, a digital designer currently working across emails, digital campaigns and social media.
